raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The legislation aims to foster a green hydrogen industry in California.",
    "The proposed pricing structure for green hydrogen production is intended to reduce greenhouse gas emissions in the industrial sector.",
    "SB 993 aims to provide low electricity prices during favorable hours to encourage large industrial customers to reduce their electricity usage during unfavorable hours.",
    "SB 1018 allows hydrogen producers or industrial customers to be supplied with clean electricity directly from large solar or wind farms.",
    "The installation of large solar or wind generators for hydrogen production will create a new exception to current regulations that limit 'behind-the-meter' generation.",
    "The legislation aims to support the development of low-carbon hydrogen and incentivize industry to move away from burning fossil fuels.",
    "SB 993 is designed to ensure that hydrogen producers and industrial users are responsible grid participants.",
    "SB 1018 is expected to contribute to California's climate goals by allowing industrial technologies to be powered entirely by renewable energy.",
    "Matching renewable energy generation directly with industrial loads could bring renewables online more quickly."
  ]
}
```
